content.en:
The third floor of the Universal Tower.

After Ye Tian entered here, the location he appeared in was the lair of a powerful creature.

The strength of this powerful creature has definitely reached the peak of its fifth-stage combat power.

Ye Tian's strength was still a little far from the peak fifth stage combat power, even if he tried his best, he still lost in the end.

After coming out of the third layer of the Cosmos Tower, the Cosmos Order on Ye Tian's body disappeared.

However, he has an extra Cosmos Mark on his body.

He had already passed through the second floor of the Cosmos Tower, so he would not need the Cosmos Order to communicate with the Cosmos Tower through the sigil in the future, and thus enter the Cosmos Tower.

This is one of the privileges of the Cosmos Tower Elite members.

"It's a pity that I didn't get the core member permissions of the Huanyu Tower, and if you want to get more Huanyu Order, it is estimated that you need the core member permissions!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor is the core member, so he has a redundant Cosmos Order.

"The Huanyu Tower is really a bit too domineering, forcibly letting other Great Ancestors become the targets of the Huanyu Tower, how does the Huanyu Alliance control such a terrifying treasure?"

"No, maybe even the Universal Alliance can't control it, the Universal Alliance just has the token to enter the Universal Tower and special permissions, that's all!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Xuan Ming Pavilion.

"The Great Ancestor of Tanglin has fallen!"

"How could the Great Ancestor of Tanglin fall, he is a top-level fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, unless he is an invincible-level fifth-stage martial power Great Ancestor, he can kill him instantly, otherwise he has a way to call for help, so as not to be killed silently!"

"I investigated, he was shrouded in the Cosmos Tower, and then he died!"

"So, he was killed by the Great Ancestor of the Universal Alliance?"

"It doesn't have to be the Great Ancestor of the Cosmos Alliance, other forces may also obtain the Cosmos Order and thus enter the Cosmos Tower!"

"There's no way to find out who did it?"

"Almost, even if it's a Heavenly Ancestor investigation, it's the same!"

"Damn, this Huanyu Tower is too domineering, for countless years, I don't know how many Great Ancestors have died in the Huanyu Tower!"

Since the Great Ancestor of Tanglin died in the Huanyu Tower, the Xuanming Pavilion could only give up.

Therefore, no one knew that the Great Ancestor of Tanglin was killed by Ye Tian, otherwise Ye Tian's name would have resounded in many realms.

......

Eternal ruins.

It is an incomparably mysterious treasure land, containing countless dangers, but also countless opportunities.

Every long time, the Eternal Ruins disappear and reappear in another place.

It's a treasure that moves!

There are many Great Ancestors who are trying to leave a mark on the Eternal True Ruins and thus lock his location.

However, whenever it moves, any imprint is erased.

Therefore, if you want to find the location of the Eternal True Ruins, you have to rely on luck.

Now.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor is inside the Eternal True Ruins.

He relied on an immeasurable armor to reach the depths of the Eternal True Ruins, and was about to obtain a treasure that was of great importance to him.

Eternal Realm Stone!

"Hahaha, finally succeeded!"

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor let the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior wrap himself and rushed out of the Eternal True Ruins with all his might.

An area of the Immeasurable Ruins.

The figure of the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor appeared, and at this moment, he was extremely embarrassed, and his whole body was full of cracks, even the Infinite Realm Armor was full of cracks.

This Infinite Realm Armor Warrior was already badly damaged, and with his attainments, he couldn't repair it at all, so he had to find a Heavenly Ancestor to help repair it, so that it could be repaired intact.

But at this moment, the phosphorus-free Great Ancestor didn't care about this loss, because he had already gotten what he wanted.

Then, it took him some time to recover from his injuries before he came to a realm.

This realm is considered a nascent realm, and there are not many strong people, and the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor occupied this territory early on, and built his own power in this territory.

After coming to this realm, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor took out the Eternal Realm Stone.

"With this Eternal Realm Stone, I can completely refine this Realm and turn this Realm into my realm. When the time comes, even if an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor enters this realm, he won't be able to kill me!"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor said excitedly.

With a realm as a realm, he is the lord of the realm!

Among the many realms, the number of realm lords is extremely rare, and even many Heavenly Ancestors are not realm masters.

To become the Lord of the Realm, you must obtain the Eternal Realm Stone.

And the Eternal Territory Stone is only found in the Eternal True Ruins, and the Eternal True Ruins will give birth to an Eternal Territory Stone for a long time.

This Eternal Frontier Stone has already fallen into his hands, and it will take a long time to give birth to another Eternal Frontier Stone.

Of course, there are many other treasures in the Eternal Ruins, and there are also treasures that are more precious than the Eternal Realm Stone.

But the most valuable thing for him is naturally this Eternal Territory Stone.

In the days that followed, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor used this Eternal Territory Stone to refine the origin of this Territory.

Time flies, and the first year of tens of millions of realms has passed unconsciously.

On this day, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor finally completely refined this territory.

In an instant, a ray of light shone from this realm to the four sides of time and space, declaring that this realm already had an owner.

Rumble!!!!

A Heavenly Ancestor tore through the Infinite Realm Ruins, and in a short period of time, dozens of Heavenly Ancestors gathered here.

They all looked at this realm of the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"Lord of the Realm, who got the Eternal Realm Stone?"

A Great Ancestor spoke.

"Just look at it!"

These Great Ancestors probed their own strength into the Realm, and soon discovered the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor who had just become the Lord of the Realm.

Many Heavenly Ancestors didn't know the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, after all, no matter how powerful the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor was, it was only a Great Ancestor who was at the peak of his fifth-stage combat power.

If the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor had the Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage combat power, they would all know the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

However, there was a great ancestor who recognized the phosphorus-free great ancestor.

"He is the phosphorus-free ancestor of the Universal Alliance!"

This Heavenly Ancestor is also a Heavenly Ancestor who came out of the Huanyu League, so he occasionally pays attention to the situation of the Huanyu League, and only then does he recognize the Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor.

"He must have discovered the Eternal True Ruins, and found the Eternal Territory Stone from the Eternal True Ruins. But this Great Ancestor's strength has not yet reached the fifth stage of the invincible level, and he can still get the Eternal Territory Stone from the Eternal True Ruins alive!!!"

These Heavenly Ancestors expressed surprise.

After all, the Eternal True Ruins are too dangerous, even if the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power enters it, it is in danger of falling!

"The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor knows the location of the Eternal True Ruins, let him tell it!"

A Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"Hmm!"

The other Heavenly Ancestors nodded.
